name: Scalar — Instagram DM After-Hours AI Receptionist

body.jsonOutput: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o', messages: [{role:'system',content:'SYSTEM_PROMPT_PLACEHOLDER — replace with full prompt from ai-receptionist-prompt.txt. Note: this is an Instagram DM context; keep responses under 1000 chars where possible.'},...($json.conversationHistory || []).map(m=>({role:m.role,content:m.content})),{role:'user',content:$json.messageText}], max_tokens: 500, temperature: 0.7 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ locationId: 'YOUR_GHL_LOCATION_ID', firstName: $json.resolvedName, source: 'Instagram AI', tags: ['instagram-lead','ai-handled'], customFields: [{ key: 'scalar_ig_history', field_value: $json.updatedHistoryJson },{ key: 'last_channel', field_value: 'Instagram' },{ key: 'ig_sender_id', field_value: $json.senderId }] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ recipient: { id: $json.senderId }, message: { text: $json.aiResponse }, messaging_type: 'RESPONSE', access_token: 'YOUR_PAGE_ACCESS_TOKEN' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ pipelineId: 'YOUR_GHL_PIPELINE_ID', locationId: 'YOUR_GHL_LOCATION_ID', name: ($json.bookingData?.name || $json.resolvedName) + ' — ' + ($json.bookingData?.service || 'Consultation'), pipelineStageId: 'YOUR_STAGE_ID_CONSULTATION_REQUESTED', status: 'open', contactId: $json.ghlContactId, source: 'Instagram AI' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ type: 'Custom', contactId: $json.ghlContactId, message: '[Instagram DM] ' + $json.contactName + ': ' + $json.messageText, locationId: 'YOUR_GHL_LOCATION_ID' }) }}

_meta.notes: SETUP REQUIRED: (1) Replace YOUR_PAGE_ACCESS_TOKEN with a long-lived Page Access Token from Meta Developer Console. (2) Replace YOUR_GHL_LOCATION_ID, YOUR_GHL_PIPELINE_ID, YOUR_STAGE_ID_CONSULTATION_REQUESTED. (3) Configure Meta Webhook: URL = your-n8n-url/webhook/instagram-inbound, fields = messages, messaging_postbacks. (4) The GET webhook handles Meta's verification challenge automatically.
